summary: Read-only process checkpoint review accepted LEAD-TRANSITION-PREPARE-001. The transition payloads are parseable, preserve null outgoing/successor thread IDs, leave no active child threads in goal/transition state, keep M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 unstarted, and provide enough persisted state for a new GPT-5.5 xhigh lead_orchestrator to recover from origin/main.

tests_run.result: Branch chore/lead-transition-prepare; modified project/goal-mode-state.json and project/model-routing-state.json; untracked transition outbox files only before this review evidence.
Only project/goal-mode-state.json and project/model-routing-state.json were tracked diffs before this review evidence.
Only project/messages/outbox/GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION.json and project/messages/outbox/LEAD-TRANSITION-PREPARE-001.json were untracked before this review evidence.
M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001 is CLOSED; M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 is DRAFT; no task is IN_PROGRESS.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape checks for transition files, goal-mode state, model-routing state, thread registry, active task statuses, and duplicate thread IDs
tests_run.result: All required JSON parsed; lead status PREPARED; transition_status PREPARED_AWAITING_SUCCESSOR; outgoing_thread_id and successor_thread_id null; active transition and goal threads empty; no duplicate thread IDs; no IN_PROGRESS tasks.

decisions: Accept the leadership transition checkpoint as a process handoff, not a gameplay task.
Do not start M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 during this review.
Treat thread IDs as session-local hints; no successor_thread_id or outgoing_thread_id was invented.
risks: Non-blocking: project/goal-mode-state.json still records last_main_commit 3e3455d8da7276f677c142db6bef6a424fc5707b while HEAD/origin/main are 268569409f8ced18c19b891c7e183d4018cc23cd. The transition and continuation files carry the current origin/main and require the successor to re-run git/task checks before continuing.
requested_action: Integrate or persist this ACCEPT review evidence, then have the successor lead_orchestrator verify from origin/main before deciding whether to start M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 through the normal workflow.
